description: Arrive and check your team in
Round-robin styled pictionary tournament. See rules for more details.
Traditional telephone game, but with code. See rules for more details.
Enjoy catered pizza! Department awards will be announced during this time.
Teams will search for hidden items around campus. See rules for more details.
Winners of the competition will be announced and closing remarks will be given.
Thank you for participating! We hope to see you again next year.
